---
title: "Writing"
listing:
  contents: Posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description]
editor: source
---

<div class="tc-page-hero">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">Writing</span>
<div class="tc-page-title">Notes & Projects</div>
<p class="tc-page-sub">Physics lab write-ups, project documentation, occasional opinions on things that interest me. Infrequent but deliberate.</p>
</div>
